description.unified: Deals ??? M.DMG that ignores enemy DEF, and heals 25% of DMG as HP.
Moves behind the furthest enemy and deals ??? M.DMG. Hit enemies take [20%->30%] increased M.DMG for [5 sec->10 sec].
Deals ??? M.DMG to all enemies in range. Gains CC immunity while using this skill.
When an enemy is killed by this hero, ATK is increased by ??? for 12 sec, and all skill cooldown is reduced by 30%.

IV.unified: Per each kill, recovers [1000->1 orb] of mana.

dark.unified: Mana consumption is increased by 1, and upon using the skill, [Absorbing Blow] is activated. Cannot use when there are no enemies in range.
DMG taken is reduced by 50% while skill is in use.

light.unified: Each stack increases Mana recovery per sec by [10%->50%].

dark.unified: While stack number is higher than 5, Mana is always at 100% and cooldowns are decreased by an additional 1 sec per each sec.

description.unified: [Absorbing Blow] Increases DMG by {0}% and upon killing an enemy, ATK is increased by 20% for 10 sec. ATK increase effect can be stacked up to max 3 times.
[Devil's Prom] Mana cost is reduced by 1, and Crit DMG is increased by {0}%.

dark.unified: All of Epis's attacks decrease the M.DEF of hit enemies by 20% for 10 sec. ATK rises by 2% per each enemy hit. Maximum stack number is 10.

description.unified: Upon attacking, there is a 25% chance of dealing {0}% of ATK as extra M.DMG, and ATK being increased by {1}% ATK boost can be stacked up to 10 times max.
